title: Autonomous Development Skills Suite: Six Composable Skills for AI Agents
description:
A suite of six composable skills designed to keep AI agents aligned, observable, and disciplined in real-world software engineering.

When AI agents operate without strict constraints, they often generate unauditable code, misunderstand requirements, and rely on shallow pattern-matching. This suite enforces rigorous engineering practices across the entire autonomous lifecycle.

  • Intent: Forces the agent to explicitly state its interpretation of the goal before writing any code.
  • Hunch & Retrospect: Surfaces implicit assumptions and provides high-level realignment to prevent the agent from drifting off target.
  • Probe: Validates whether the agent is employing genuine reasoning or merely pattern-matching.
  • Improve: Executes a structured examine-challenge-decide-act-reflect loop, prioritizing deep structural improvements over superficial fixes.
  • Trail: Ensures full accountability by logging every decision, discarded alternative, and rationale. Autonomy without observability is abdication.
